title: N2 night-time lane closure at Pacaltsdorp Bridge and M12 exit in George
description: GEORGE NEWS - The South African National...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL) has announced that a night-time lane closure from 19:00 to 20:00 will be in place on the N2 at the Pacaltsdorp Bridge and the M12 exit onto the N2 in George tonight, Tuesday, 6 August.

These closures are required as part of the ongoing construction of the new bridge at the Thembalethu interchange across the N2.


> “During the road closures, motorists will be diverted at the Pacaltsdorp Bridge and at the M12 exit onto the N2,” said Petronella Theron, SANRAL Project Manager.


SANRAL apologises for any inconvenience caused.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
